workload.prompt: Explain what a diffusion language model is in one sentence.
workload.device: Blackhole P150x4 (4x p300c, consumer B850M-C host), (1,4) mesh, TP=4

measured_path: traced Metal capture/replay + synchronized per-op/per-component device-time tables

DG_NORM_FULLCANVAS.what: HIGH-4: one 256-row width-sharded rms_norm instead of 8x(32-row slice->norm->DRAM-concat)
DG_NORM_FULLCANVAS.landing: opt-in; not bit-identical (bf16 block_h reduction-order); recommend default-flip pending dg-05 decision-fidelity vs HF

DG_MOE_L1.what: HIGH-1 gather + HIGH-2 down: pin the 23MB gather/down MoE activation outputs L1 instead of DRAM
DG_MOE_L1.landing: rejected as default (wash within noise; DRAM round-trips overlap-hidden under trace); flag retained for reuse if a fused gather-experts kernel removes the overlap

named_limitations: hardware-profiler-limited: ENABLE_TRACY=OFF, tt-perf-report op-CSV unavailable; per-step/per-block/full-generation numbers are from traced Metal capture/replay + synchronized per-op device-time tables
watcher-clean verified with TT_METAL_WATCHER_DISABLE_ETH=1 (ACTIVE_ETH kernel-config-buffer overflow is a known watcher+fabric limitation, not a norm-change defect)
HIGH-4 not bit-identical to the chunked path (bf16 sharded-norm block_h reduction-order); coherent output, per-norm PCC 0.999998; lands opt-in until decision-fidelity vs HF is validated
MoE expert matmul is weight-bound at ~92% of the 256 GB/s roofline (immovable in-repo); terminal argmax/entropy over 262144 vocab blocked by the 18-bit-index fp32-reduction wall (out-of-gate)
model-faithful @48 baseline 17.86-18.13 t/s; HIGH-4 lifts the model-faithful @48 to 20.68 t/s if flipped on
